meta.name: Closero Design Tokens (Bone)
meta.source: Notion: Closero Design System & Screen Notes
meta.note: Single source of truth. Generate Flutter theme + web CSS :root from this file. Never hand-copy hexes per screen.

dim2.usage: Inactive nav/icons, small-caps section labels. NOT body copy (2.09:1)

dim1.usage: Tertiary chrome only. NOT body copy (2.37:1)

body.usage: Secondary body copy (~6.5:1). Use for all real sentences

mid.usage: Legacy secondary text; prefer body for new copy

hi2.usage: Active nav, card titles, default bar/chart fill

accent.usage: Warm bone. ONLY: primary CTA fill, mic-on control, pricing recommended tier, app icon, income-track gradient end

accentDim.usage: Favicon fill, selection-state left borders, income-track gradient start

green.usage: Positive deltas, coaching good state, momentum dots, live/complete status dots and text, personal-best score text at 75+

red.usage: Coaching miss, destructive text and left borders

destructive.usage: Destructive button fill (solid). Never a tinted wash

artViolet.usage: Persona art gradient top, violet cast. Fades to base. Decorative avatar art only, never semantic

artUmber.usage: Persona art gradient top, warm umber cast. Fades to base. Decorative avatar art only, never semantic

artMoss.usage: Persona art gradient top, moss cast. Fades to base. Decorative avatar art only, never semantic

artSlate.usage: Persona art gradient top, cool slate cast. Fades to base. Decorative avatar art only, never semantic

typography.rule: 18px+ AND bold -> Bricolage; everything else -> Figtree. Sentence case except short inline badges.

components.card: surface bg, 1px border, 5-6px radius, no shadow/glow
components.ghostButton: transparent, border2 border, mid text — never accent
components.destructiveButton: solid destructive fill, onDestructive text, 5px radius — never a red-tinted wash
components.navActive: hi2 text + 2px accentDim left border + faint bg tint
components.chartsThresholds: rings and bars: hi2 >=75 / mid 60-74 / dim1 <60 — never accent (income track is the sole exception)
components.toggle: pure CSS, grayscale only, never accent
components.grain: 2.5% opacity noise on every base surface
components.scoreText: score text on cards/lists: green >=75 / hi2 60-74 / mid <60 — rings keep the ring rule
components.personaArt: avatar placeholder = vertical gradient artX -> base behind faint dim3 initials; tint is per persona and decorative only

iconography.signature: -60deg: exactly one -60° element per icon (gap or shear), 15x15 viewBox, 1.2-1.5 stroke, round caps, grayscale dim2->hi2 (flame excepted)
iconography.closedCircleBelow: r ~2.5 (gap reads as error at that size)
